instruction: Reply to Lena Ortiz at South Harbor Community Alliance about the multilingual tenant-rights workshop. Tell her I can join the planning call on 2026-09-15 at 18:30, ask her to share the latest flyer text and interpreter headcount, and let her know I can bring the sign-in sheets and feedback forms.

rule_ref.rule_text: When she is preparing an outgoing message that represents her professionally or in community work, Samantha prefers it to be drafted for review rather than sent immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I like important work or community messages drafted first so I can review the tone before they go out.

attributes.subject: Planning call for multilingual tenant-rights workshop
attributes.body: Hi Samantha, we're finalizing the South Harbor Community Alliance tenant-rights workshop for the neighborhood centers. Could you join the planning call and let me know how many interpreters we should budget for? If you have sign-in sheets or feedback forms you can bring, that would help. We also need the latest flyer text before we print anything.

attributes.subject: September workspace invoice available
attributes.body: Your monthly workspace invoice is now available in the member portal.

attributes.subject: Dinner this weekend?
attributes.body: Hey Samantha, are you free to grab dinner this weekend? No worries if you're booked up.
